# Getting started

This is a simple document with enough words to analyze. It covers the basic setup process for new users who want to get started quickly.

You need to install the package first. Then configure your settings. After that you can start using the tool immediately.

The installation process is straightforward. Download the package from the website. Run the installer and follow the prompts. The whole process takes about five minutes.

## Configuration

Edit the config file to set your preferences. The default settings work for most users. Advanced users can customize the behavior.
